title: 見えないものは、見なくてもいい

text_block_list.text:
I remember, a long time ago, a friend and I used
to play pretend cafe. That's why... I...

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text: Damn it! Still can't find it... I just can't solve it...

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text:
Tch... Now every little thing is starting to get on
my nerves. Even looking at this scenery...

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text: Whoa, that was close!

text_block_list.name: Umamusume Child
text_block_list.text: Oops, sorry! I'm in a rush, so smell you later!

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text: ...Geez, what a pesky brat.

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text: Hm? Was there always a cafe around here?

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text: ...Well, maybe I could use a caffeine boost.

text_block_list.name: Manhattan Cafe
text_block_list.text: Welcome.

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text:
Cafe? You work part-time here? Actually, never
mind that...

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text:
The exterior was strange enough, but the interior
is just as disorderly and chaotic.

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text:
...Tch, I can't stand the slightest fluctuation
today. Honestly, what is wrong with my brain...

text_block_list.name: Manhattan Cafe
text_block_list.text: ...I'll pour you... a cup of coffee.

text_block_list.name: Manhattan Cafe
text_block_list.text: ...Here you are.

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text:
What's this, latte art? What a complete waste of
effort. I didn't—

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text: ...This pattern. Is it a fractal?

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text:
It ripples and turns... without end... in complete
unity... and beauty...

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text:
The sea...
Yeah... That's what I came here for.

text_block_list.name: Manhattan Cafe
text_block_list.text:
The winds and waves are peaceful now, but
they're going to get worse later. Such a shame...
The weather's so nice at the moment.

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text: The weather's... nice?

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text:
The weather is simply a matter of phenomena.
There's nothing "good" or "bad" about it.

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text:
It's just humans ascribing their own values to the
Earth's natural systems.

text_block_list.name: Manhattan Cafe
text_block_list.text:
...I see. Perhaps we shouldn't force our own
values... onto the matters of this world.

text_block_list.name: Manhattan Cafe
text_block_list.text:
We should... just let everything be as it is. We just
have to feel... and observe.

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text:
Yeah, all we gotta do is watch. Forcing our
preconceived notions onto reality distorts our
understanding.

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text:
...That's it! It was so obvious... There's no need to
analyze phenomena from my personal bias.

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text:
Gah! Geez, the answer was practically starin' at
me in the face.

text_block_list.name: Manhattan Cafe
text_block_list.text:
...I'm looking forward to your next visit. I will have
a special brew ready... just for you.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
One day, while walking through the shopping
district, I spot Air Shakur standing in an empty
plot.
choice_data_list: What are you doing in a place like this?

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text: Huh?! Well... I was... just at that cafe over—

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text: What the?! Where'd it go?!

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text:
I guess I... Yeah... I was just out here walking laps
on an empty plot of land.

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text: That's... really weird.
